description: Every card from the deck-building game Dominion (Donald X. Vaccarino, Rio Grande Games), grouped by expansion.
source: Data scraped from the Dominion Strategy Wiki (wiki.dominionstrategy.com), packaged in the MIT-licensed PyPI 'dominion' project by Dan Foreman-Mackey (github.com/dfm/dominion).
snapshot: Covers expansions released through Menagerie (2020). Does NOT include the three later large expansions: Allies (2022), Plunder (2023), or Rising Sun (2023). See the 'Expansions not in this dataset' section of dominion_cards.md for details.
